heading: Compensation: Reserve on active duty accepting from any person
label: 12601 Compensation: Reserve on active duty accepting from any person
text: Any Reserve who, before being ordered to active duty, was receiving compensation from any person may, while he is on that duty, receive compensation from that person.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1033 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(g)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
